description_long: This is a modern athletic running shoe designed for trail use, featuring a combination of synthetic mesh and textile materials. The upper is primarily gray with black mesh overlays, accented by a bold red toe cap and outsole, and a speckled white midsole. The shoe displays the word 'GORE-TEX' on the lateral side, indicating waterproof and breathable properties, and has a green heel tab with 'PEGASUS GTX' branding. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with black and tan laces, and the tongue is padded and light orange in color. The outsole is rugged and lugged for enhanced traction, making it suitable for urban and off-road environments.
description: A gray and red trail running shoe with GORE-TEX branding, speckled white midsole, and a rugged lugged outsole. Features include a green heel tab, black mesh overlays, and standard criss-cross lacing.
description_view_0: Front-side view showing the gray mesh upper, red toe cap, GORE-TEX branding, and criss-cross lacing.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the green heel tab with 'PEGASUS GTX' text and the speckled white midsole.
description_view_2: Lateral side view displaying the black Nike Swoosh, GORE-TEX branding, and the full profile of the rugged outsole.
description_view_3: Frontal view focusing on the lacing system, padded tongue, and the red toe cap with lugged tread visible.
attribute_logo: Black Nike Swoosh on the lateral side near the heel
